databaseQuery.correct:
const SecureDataAccess = require('./services/secureDataAccess');
const result = await SecureDataAccess.query('collection', { field: value }, { fields: ['allowed', 'fields'] });

apiCall.correct:
const secureApiClient = require('./services/secureApiClient');
const response = await secureApiClient.request('/endpoint', { method: 'GET', headers: { /* validated */ } });

fileOperation.correct:
const secureFileSystem = require('./services/secureFileSystem');
const content = await secureFileSystem.readFile('path/to/file', { encoding: 'utf8' });

authentication.correct:
const authService = require('./services/authService');
const isValid = await authService.validateToken(token, { checkExpiry: true, verifySignature: true });

inputValidation.correct:
const validator = require('./utils/validator');
const sanitized = validator.sanitize(input, { type: 'string', maxLength: 255, pattern: /^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$/ });

encryption.correct:
const encryptionService = require('./services/encryptionService');
const encrypted = await encryptionService.encrypt(data, { algorithm: 'AES-256-GCM' });

sessionManagement.correct:
const sessionManager = require('./services/sessionManager');
const session = await sessionManager.create({ userId, practiceId, secure: true, httpOnly: true });

forbiddenPatterns.alternative: Use JSON.parse() or specific parsing functions
Use predefined functions or switch statements
Use specific safe exec functions with validation

requiredPatterns.message: Database operations must use SecureDataAccess and include audit logging
API calls must use secureApiClient with error handling
Error handling must include try-catch, logging, and sanitization
File operations must use secureFileSystem with path validation

codeReviewRules.message: Never hardcode secrets. Use environment variables or secret management service
All data modifications must include audit logging
All user inputs must be validated and sanitized
Sessions must use secure, httpOnly, and sameSite flags
Use proper logging service instead of console

securePatientQuery.description: Example of secure patient data query
